ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fund_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., new, reduced, added) */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the fund's value due to the transaction */,
  "dollar_change" REAL /* Dollar amount change due to the transaction */,
  "dollar_held" REAL /* Dollar amount held in the fund after the transaction */,
  "percentage_portfolio" REAL /* Percentage of the portfolio represented by the fund after the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* The actual amount of the transaction (e.g., shares or units) */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* The status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who executed the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_transactions_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_transactions_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* The type of the fund (e.g., equity, bond, hybrid) */,
  "fund_currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the fund is denominated */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the fund was created */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* The date the fund was closed, if applicable */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* The minimum investment required to join the fund */,
  "performance_fee" REAL /* The performance fee charged by the fund manager */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* The management fee charged by the fund manager */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the fund (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fund manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* The number of years of experience the manager has */,
  "education" TEXT /* The highest level of education the manager has attained */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the manager holds */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the manager */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* A rating of the manager's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio composition record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund in the portfolio */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the portfolio represented by the fund */,
  "composition_date" TEXT /* The date when the composition was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the composition is denominated */,
  "value" REAL /* The total value of the fund in the portfolio */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_composition_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_composition_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the portfolio was created */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* The date the portfolio was closed, if applicable */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* The investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "performance_fee" REAL /* The performance fee charged for the portfolio */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* The management fee charged for the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* The total value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the client */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* The risk profile of the client (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* The investment objective of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the fund on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* The quality of the market data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk analysis record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk analysis was conducted */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the fund */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* The risk factors considered in the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the risk score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the risk analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_analysis_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the performance report */,
  "performance_period" TEXT /* The period for which the report is generated (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* The performance metrics included in the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., contract, invoice) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* The date the document was created */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* The size of the document in bytes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_documents_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES fund_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who triggered the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client that triggered the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "module" TEXT /* The module or part of the system where the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client that made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, portfolio manager) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or part of the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the access control became active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the access control will expire */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was conducted */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auditor who conducted the check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* The type of compliance check (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "check_results" TEXT /* The detailed results of the compliance check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the auditor */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the auditor joined the system */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* The date and time of the auditor's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the auditor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the auditor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id")
)
